prose.en: Providers MAY include additional materials about other information resources that are not part of the cloud service offering in a FedRAMP Certification Package supplement; these resources will not be FedRAMP Certified and MUST be clearly marked and separated from the cloud service offering.

note.en: This is intended to allow inclusion of things like security materials for apps, supplemental marketing collateral, and other information that is not part of the cloud service offering but may be useful to agencies.
